segments.speaker: Doctor
segments.text: Hello , what problem are you having today ?

segments.speaker: Patient
segments.text: I have had a headache for the past 3 days and I feel slightly feverish .

segments.speaker: Doctor
segments.text: Do you have any vomiting or dizziness ?

segments.speaker: Patient
segments.text: No vomiting but I feel a little tired .

segments.speaker: Doctor
segments.text: Your temperature is 99 degrees Fahrenheit and your pulse is 90 .

segments.speaker: Doctor
segments.text: It looks a mild viral infection .

segments.speaker: Doctor
segments.text: I will prescribe paracetamol 650 mg to ice a day for 3 days .

segments.speaker: Doctor
segments.text: Please drink plenty of fluids and take rest .
